title: Logical error: 'row_subgroup.stage == ReadStage::Deliver'.
description:
### Describe the bug
Saw this on the CI yesterday. Got a reproducible today but may not be the same root cause. On my case, the issue may be: `output_format_parquet_row_group_size = 0`.
### How to reproduce
Run in a loop (seems to be a race condition):
```sql
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE t0 (c0 UInt64) ENGINE = IcebergS3(s3, filename = 't11', format = 'Parquet') PARTITION BY tuple();
DETACH TABLE t0 PERMANENTLY;
SET input_format_parquet_use_native_reader_v3 = 1, output_format_parquet_row_group_size = 0;
ATTACH TABLE t0;
SET query_plan_enable_optimizations = 0;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SELECT CAST(number AS UInt64) FROM numbers(924);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SELECT c0 FROM generateRandom('c0 UInt64', 5445531875995920648, 701, 7) LIMIT 780;
ALTER TABLE t0 (DELETE WHERE c0); --may trigger the logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```

<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 REAL);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL), (2, 'data', 3.14), (3, 'example', NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT c1, c3 FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD COLUMN c4 DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) SELECT number, CAST(number AS TEXT) FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) WHERE number % 2 = 0;
